data.name: Wife of My Boss
data.detailed_description:
Wife of My Boss is a visual novel about an average office worker who works in an average company doing average office job. What's not average about his life is his boss - an absolute evil being who ruins everyone's life. Forcing employees to work overtime or insulting them is a common thing for him. Everybody hates him, but there is one person in this world who doesn't see him like a scumbag - his new wife, who still doesn't know about his behavior at work.

Now our hero is going to slowly take her away by corrupting her mind and personality. Destroying boss's life - just like he destroyed everyone's.

FEATURES
• About 1 hour of content.
• Exciting story.
• HD fully original artworks.
• Relaxing soundtrack.
• Cute wife Lily!

data.short_description: When your boss is an asshole who ruins your life - it's time to take revenge and steal his wife!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 275 MB 可用空間
